---
title: "19 May 2026: Currently working"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-05-19"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Work from UQ day last week, we had so much fun brainstorming (whiteboard!) and having lunch we forgot to take a photo (sorry LinkedIn).....

Draft data portal deployed at QCIF - still lots to do but it's fun to see something! It's real!....

RAIN...
